title: Clean Desk Policy
contentText: All staff must ensure their workstations are clear of sensitive documents at the end of each working day. Physical documents containing confidential information must be stored in locked drawers. Whiteboards and screens must be cleared before leaving the office.

title: Acceptable Use Policy
contentText: NDMA ICT resources including computers, internet access, and email systems are provided for official use. Personal use must be minimal and must not compromise security. Staff must not install unauthorised software or access restricted systems.

title: Data Classification Policy
contentText: All data handled by NDMA DCS staff must be classified as Public, Internal, Confidential, or Restricted. Restricted data must not leave the secure network perimeter without written authorisation from the Head of DCS.
